title: Analysis Route Decision: Revision-Pass Fill-Gaps
summary: The revision pass has no evidence gap that requires new experiments. The analysis stage routes to write so the draft can be corrected, figures rendered, and citations resolved.

sections.reason: Review route decision was 'revise'. The review issues are text/production gaps (calibration description, citations, figures), not missing measurements. The existing experiment and analysis evidence fully supports the corrected claims.
conditions_for_revisiting: If manuscript validation after revise still fails, return to analysis or review.
If real B200 measurements become available, run a transfer-validation slice.
